plugins.name: huston-service-quoting
plugins.description: Create professional electrical service quotations for Huston Electric, Inc. Covers electrical service, sign, generator, IR scan, and EMP quotations with NECA labor standards, material pricing, and automated document generation.

plugins.name: huston-estimating
plugins.description: Electrical estimating and drawing analysis for Huston Electric, Inc. Analyze floor plans, count fixtures, fill bid checklists, and prepare apartment bid budgets for accurate project bidding.

plugins.name: huston-safety
plugins.description: Electrical safety compliance and documentation for Huston Electric, Inc. Safety procedures, OSHA compliance, Project-Specific Safety Plans (PSSP), hazard analysis, and workplace safety protocols.

plugins.name: huston-workforce
plugins.description: Workforce analytics and project scheduling for Huston Electric, Inc. Track union manpower projections, identify staffing needs, build project schedules, and generate workforce planning reports.

plugins.name: huston-bid-intelligence
plugins.description: Bid tracking, analysis, and strategy for Huston Electric, Inc. Transform bid emails into organized intelligence reports, analyze bid opportunities, and support Tuesday strategy meetings with union-based Excel reports.

plugins.name: huston-it-support
plugins.description: Internal IT support for Huston Electric employees. Handles Outlook questions, Jonas portal issues, hardware troubleshooting, network connectivity, and escalation to the IT team when needed.

plugins.name: huston-finance-prequalification
plugins.description: Financial prequalification and compliance for Huston Electric, Inc. Automatically fill prequal PDF forms, manage company financial data, and maintain prequalification documentation using past submissions and company knowledge bases.

plugins.name: huston-field-diagnostics
plugins.description: Field diagnostics and testing for Huston Electric, Inc. Power quality analysis, infrared scanning interpretation, and comprehensive field diagnostic methodology for electrical systems.
